utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items explicitly. Each entry contains the relevant coverage details and the associated estimated costs, satisfying the requirement of being fully specified according to the format. Therefore, all 5/5 items are properly included and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan includes four main items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. For health_coverage, the description emphasizes 'physical and mental health insurance with global coverage, cardiovascular and respiratory specialist access, prescription coverage, preventive care, and 24/7 emergency support,' which aligns best with the EliteCare Premium Plan (rating 10) for both physical and mental health. For property_coverage, 'home and contents insurance with luxury items protection up to high-value coverage levels' matches EliteHome Premium Coverage (rating 10). For travel_coverage, 'international travel insurance with medical evacuation, business travel protection, emergency coordination' aligns with EliteTravel Premium Plan (rating 10). Finally, 'additional_services: concierge services, dedicated agent, priority claims processing, global assistance' corresponds to Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10) from general_services. Therefore, the ratings are EliteCare Premium Plan (10), EliteHome Premium Coverage (10), EliteTravel Premium Plan (10), and Premium Insurance Membership (10).
